description: Feature queue M.E.R.L.I.N. — active tasks only. Completed tasks archived in completed_archive.json.

tasks.title: Supprimer dead code merlin_constants.gd (14 ELEMENTS, ESSENCE_*, FLUX_*, etc.)
tasks.description: DEV_PLAN Phase 0: Supprimer ELEMENTS (14), ESSENCE_DROP_*, ESSENCE_ANCHOR_CARDS, ESSENCE_BASE_REWARDS, ESSENCE_VICTORY_BONUS, ESSENCE_CHUTE_BONUS, ESSENCE_MINIGAME_BONUS, ESSENCE_OGHAM_BONUS, ESSENCE_FACTION_BONUS, FLUX_*, RUN_TYPOLOGIES, DC_BASE, DC_DIFFICULTY_LABELS, ARCHETYPE_DC_BONUS, BOND_TIERS, OGHAM_STARTER_SKILLS, CardOption enum. validate.bat apres.

tasks.title: Nettoyer merlin_store.gd dead state (essence, bestiole, ogham_fragments)
tasks.description: DEV_PLAN Phase 0: Supprimer meta state keys: essence{14}, ogham_fragments, liens, gloire_points, bestiole_evolution. Renommer _init_triade_run -> _init_run, _resolve_triade_choice -> _resolve_choice, _check_triade_run_end -> _check_run_end, _apply_triade_effect -> _apply_effect, _handle_triade_run_end -> _handle_run_end.

tasks.title: Supprimer TRIADE_ action dispatch prefix dans store + callers
tasks.description: DEV_PLAN Phase 0: Renommer TRIADE_START_RUN->START_RUN, TRIADE_GET_CARD->GET_CARD, etc. Dans tous les callers.

tasks.title: Supprimer dead code merlin_card_system.gd (GAUGES, bestiole)
tasks.description: DEV_PLAN Phase 0: Supprimer GAUGES const, gauge init in init_run(), gauge checks in check_run_end(), _get_critical_gauges(), gauge effects in _apply_card_effects(), bestiole context block, _get_bestiole_modifier().

tasks.title: Supprimer dead files (bestiole, souffle HUD, D20 dice)
tasks.description: DEV_PLAN Phase 0: Supprimer entierement les fichiers de systemes morts.

tasks.title: Aligner 18 Oghams sur bible v2.4 (effets corrects)
tasks.description: DEV_PLAN Phase 1A: Corriger divergences code/bible pour les 18 Oghams avec 10 champs obligatoires.

tasks.title: Ajouter 8 biomes avec seuils maturite et EFFECT_CAPS
tasks.description: DEV_PLAN Phase 1B+1C: Ajouter BIOMES dict, BIOME_MATURITY_THRESHOLDS, MATURITY_WEIGHTS, EFFECT_CAPS, MULTIPLIER_TABLE, ANAM_REWARDS, TALENT_TIERS.

tasks.title: Ajouter 45 verbes d'action + mapping champs lexicaux + MOS config
tasks.description: DEV_PLAN Phase 1D+1F: Ajouter ACTION_VERBS, FIELD_MINIGAMES, MOS_CONVERGENCE, TRUST_TIERS, TRUST_DELTAS, IN_GAME_PERIODS.

tasks.title: Playtest session: core loop flow analysis
tasks.description: Simuler 10 sessions de jeu completes. Tracer le core loop. Verifier invariants: vie 0-100, rep caps +/-20/carte, MOS soft min 8 / hard max 50, drain -1/carte.

tasks.title: Game Design Bible audit: code vs spec compliance
tasks.description: Audit complet code vs GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md v2.4. Verifier les 12 systemes. Detecter dead code des systemes supprimes.

tasks.title: Bug hunt: static analysis of 8 core files
tasks.description: Analyse statique des 8 fichiers core. Chercher: null/invalid access, type mismatches, state machine bugs, resource leaks.

tasks.title: Playtest session: death & edge case scenarios
tasks.description: Simuler 10 scenarios de mort et edge cases: vie=0 pendant effet, toutes factions a 0/100, Ogham sans ressources, MOS hard max, save mid-run.

tasks.title: Bug hunt: LLM integration & AI layer
tasks.description: Analyse statique du layer IA. Chercher: timeout LLM, JSON malforme, fallback si Ollama down, race condition multi-brain.
